case_title: HAROLD GREENWOOD VS. WALGREENS HEALTH INITIATIVES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
STIPULATION FOR FILING AMENDED COMPLAINT; REQUEST FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENWOOD, HAROLD
POS RE: SEE ATTACHMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENWOOD, HAROLD

MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SETS 1 & 2, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET 1, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. HEARING SET FOR MAY-12-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SETS ONE AND TWO, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND FULLY WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $820, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/02/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Sets 1 & 2, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set 1
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Harold Greenwood, Plaintiff in Propria Persona; No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Sets One And Two, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $820, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
